ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rfqs" (
  "rfq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RFQ */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the RFQ */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the RFQ was issued */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the RFQ is set to close */,
  "action" TEXT /* Current action or status of the RFQ */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department that issued the RFQ */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the RFQ */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update made to the RFQ */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Current status of the RFQ */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rfq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfqs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfqs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfqs_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES rfq_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  "head_of_department" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the supplier based on past performance */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the supplier (if applicable) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rfq_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "rfq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RFQ being responded to */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "quote" REAL /* Quote provided by the supplier */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the supplier's response */,
  "evaluated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who evaluated the supplier's response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfq_responses_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfq_responses_rfq_id FOREIGN KEY ("rfq_id") REFERENCES rfqs ("rfq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfq_responses_evaluated_by FOREIGN KEY ("evaluated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rfq_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "rfq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RFQ the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type of the attachment */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfq_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfq_attachments_rfq_id FOREIGN KEY ("rfq_id") REFERENCES rfqs ("rfq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rfq_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action in the history */,
  "rfq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RFQ the action was taken on */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the action */,
  "action_taken_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the action */,
  "action_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfq_history_rfq_id FOREIGN KEY ("rfq_id") REFERENCES rfqs ("rfq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfq_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfq_history_action_taken_by FOREIGN KEY ("action_taken_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., procurement officer, manager) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rfq_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfq_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES rfq_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rfq_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "rfq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RFQ the item is associated with */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the item belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item requested */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the item (calculated by multiplying the quantity by the unit price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfq_items_rfq_id FOREIGN KEY ("rfq_id") REFERENCES rfqs ("rfq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfq_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES rfq_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rfq_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "rfq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RFQ the contact is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rfq_contacts_rfq_id FOREIGN KEY ("rfq_id") REFERENCES rfqs ("rfq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rfq_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_order" INTEGER /* Order of the status in the RFQ workflow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)
